summary: Backend-only testing for MyStudyBody exam/image features. All 15 pytest tests passed (100%). Tested: auth register/login, POST /api/errors with image_base64 saved to disk, GET /api/images/{id} serving files, GET /api/exam/questions with filters, POST /api/exam/results.

minor.issue: logger is defined at line 595 (after route definitions). Works at runtime since functions execute after module load, but unconventional. bcrypt __about__ AttributeError warning on startup (harmless, passlib compatibility warning with newer bcrypt).

critical_code_review_comments: logger defined at line 595 but used in route handlers above - works at runtime but should be moved to top of file for clarity
seed_data_creation: Created test user TEST_exam_*@test.com and one error scan with image during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All exam/image backend APIs verified working. Test user ID=16990051-49d1-49f1-91d7-6ace94b9a74f has error scan data with image at /api/images/{uuid}.jpg
